creator: cwf-ml@arcor.de
text:
padawan# [syslog-ng] pwd
/var/db/ports/syslog-ng
padawan# [syslog-ng] cat options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for syslog-ng-3.3.5
_OPTIONS_READ=syslog-ng-3.3.5
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=SYS_SSL PORTS_SSL TCP_WRAPPERS SQL SPOOF IPV6
PCRE JSON_C JSON_GLIB
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SYS_SSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PORTS_SSL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=TCP_WRAPPERS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SPOOF
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IPV6
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PCRE
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=JSON_C
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=JSON_GLIB
padawan# [syslog-ng]
